bird.name: 南秧雞
bird.summary: 巨水鸡（学名：Porphyrio hochstetteri，英文、毛利語：takahē，台湾作南秧雞），又名南島青水雞、南岛秧鸡、泰卡雞，是紫水雞屬的一種鳥類，分布于包括澳大利亚、紐西兰，塔斯马尼亚及其附近的岛屿。曾於1898年被認為經已滅絕，後於1948年再次被發現。 特徵…

relations.subject: 南秧雞
relations.evidence: thumb|Adult feeding a chick The South Island takahē is a sedentary and flightless bird currently found in alpine grasslands habitats
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 南秧雞
relations.evidence: The takahē's preferred habitat is alpine grasslands.{{Cite journal |last=Mills |first=J
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 南秧雞
relations.evidence: The near extinction of the formerly widespread South Island takahē is due to a number of factors: over-hunting, loss of habitat and introduced predators have all played a part
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 南秧雞
relations.evidence: The near extinction of the formerly widespread South Island takahē is due to a number of factors: over-hunting, loss of habitat and introduced predators have all played a part
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
